header.title: Spinner
header.subtitle: Atomic loading indicator. Used standalone or composed inside other components (Button, list rows, overlays).

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Four presets aligned with type and icon scales. Default is md.

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: Use current to inherit the parent's color (default), accent for branded loaders, or muted for ambient indicators.

props.title: Props
props.description: All standard SVG attributes are supported.

futureNote.title: More patterns coming
futureNote.description: Full loading patterns and composition examples will land in the Feedback section of the showcase.

props.label: Accessible name for assistive technology. Defaults to "Loading".
props.className: Optional class merged with the base spinner classes.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Always pass label as a translated string in user-facing contexts.
